 Claude can now track every financial trade that Congress is making real time. There's a free MCP server called Unusual Whales. It plugs Claude straight into live market data. Most people find out what the smart money bought weeks too late. Now Claude can do it instantly. Here's how it's actually useful. After it's connected, open Claude and say, pull every stock a member of Congress bought this week. Rank them by how many members bought each one. And tell me what each company does. 10 seconds later, you'll have the list that the news won't publish for a month. Then maximize this potential and say, cross-check those tickers with the latest 13F institutional filings. Show me where Congress and the big funds are buying the same day. Now you'll see the overlap that normal people will never get to see. This is the same data that funds are paying thousands for. And it's read back to you in plain English for free. That's why this MCP server is so overpowered. I made a guide with the install command for the MCP server as well as the prompts and setup guide for everything. Comment stocks and I'll send it right to your inbox.
